div.span:
[rbp] Return Address (8 bytes)
Pushed by CALL instruction

[rbp-16] Local var 1
[rbp-24] Local var 2
[rbp-32] Local var 3
Function Call with 7+ Arguments (System V AMD64 ABI)

Arguments 1-6
RDI, RSI, RDX, RCX, R8, R9

Arguments 7+ pushed on stack
(right to left order)

call function
Pushes return address
Jumps to function entry

Function prologue:
push rbp
mov rbp, rsp
sub rsp, N (local space)

Function body executes
Access args via registers/[rbp+offset]
Access locals via [rbp-offset]

Function epilogue:
mov rsp, rbp
pop rbp
ret

Return to caller
Pop return address into RIP
RAX contains return value
